statement: In every magma, Equation 2514 (`x = (y * ((x * z) * x)) * y`) implies Equation 1762 (`x = (y * z) * ((x * y) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0083
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x z) x)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op x y) w))
